title: Komárno, Nitra Region — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Komárno, Nitra Region: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Komárno is a city in Nitra Region with a population of 33,751. A historic town on the Danube at the Hungarian border, known for its Hungarian cultural heritage, the Komárno Fortress system, and its river port.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
